content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To    :  Al              Dan           Gina                    Date  :  Oct. 15, 1976
       Barb         Jeanne        Gail (OR's only)
       Bob          Mike          John K.
       Rick         Mickey        Nan
       Del          Natalie       Rich
       Ed           Ted           Jay
       Ken G.       Fred

From  :  FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION             M-76-451
         Ken Finney

Subject:


     It was determined at the Opinion Request Meeting of Thursday,
October 14, 1976, that the failure to file a Statement of
Economic Interests ten days prior to assuming office, as required by Gov. Code Section 87202, does not preclude the individual with the filing obligation from assuming office.
It merely means that the filer has violated the Act and is
subject to a fine for the late filing and to any other penalties authorized by the Act.

     This apparently conflicts with advice which has been given
on previous occasions, but represents the present position
of the staff and should be relied on in the future.

KF:jo
